en: Once more, hunting becomes extra tricky for me,
ko: 다시 한 번, 사냥은 내게 훨씬 더 까다로워진다.

en: trying to hide myself in the bone-dry forest.
ko: 바짝 메마른 숲에 몸을 숨겨야 하기 때문이다.

en: But I've learned something from life in the wet season looking like I do.
Even during the dry season, I can find darkness.
First thing I have to do is keep out of sight of those troublesome langurs.
ko: 우선 그 성가신 녀석들 눈에 띄지 않아야 한다.
